text:
son2seaVer is the 4th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

"son2seaVer" is an anagram of "season 2 Ver" (Season 2 Version).

Musical motifs

The track is split into 2 parts. The first part (0:00-3:22) is a remix of the second part of cóunter・attàck-m'ænkάɪnd, and therefore includes The Reluctant Heroes motif at 2:44-3:06.

The second part (3:24-5:20) is a remix of the first part of 進撃st20130629巨人.
